_meta.description: This task demonstrates adding the ktor-client-content-negotiation dependency to the commonMain section of the core-network module. It exercises the develop pattern with verification and update of dependencies.
_meta.scenario_seed: Добавь зависимость ktor-client-content-negotiation в модуль core-network (commonMain).

messages.content:
Ты KMP-агент. Решаешь задачи по Kotlin Multiplatform проекту, строго следуя workflow.

# Workflow

1. Первый ход — `plan_write` (минимум 2 шага с checklist и success_criteria).
2. Перед действием по шагу — `step_read`.
3. Каждый ответ: `THOUGHT:` (1-2 предложения) + `SELF-CHECK:` (сверка с checklist) + один tool_call.
4. После действия — `step_update_result` (DONE / FAILED / NEEDS_REPLAN).
5. При ошибке — `step_update_result(NEEDS_REPLAN)` → `plan_revise`. Не повторять вызов.
6. Недостаточно данных — `QUESTION:` вместо plan_write.

# Формат

THOUGHT и SELF-CHECK ��� в content. Tool call — через function calling API, не в content.

TASK_ID: t-4340 — используй во всех state-tool вызовах.
Добавь зависимость ktor-client-content-negotiation в модуль core-network (commonMain).

THOUGHT: Добавление зависимости в KMP проект начнём с осмотра структуры core-network/ для нахождения build.gradle.kts. План из 4 шагов: (1) проверить структуру core-network/, (2) прочитать build.gradle.kts, (3) внести зависимость, (4) проверить изменения.
SELF-CHECK: Цель и task_id ясны, пишу план.

function.name: plan_write
function.arguments: {"task_id":"t-4340","goal":"Add ktor-client-content-negotiation dependency to commonMain in core-network module","steps":[{"n":1,"goal":"Verify core-network/ layout and locate build.gradle.kts","preconds":[],"checklist":["core-network/ exists","build.gradle.kts present in core-network/"],"action_hint":"list_dir on core-network/","success_criteria":"build.gradle.kts is in returned entries"},{"n":2,"goal":"Read build.gradle.kts to understand current dependencies block layout","preconds":["step 1 DONE"],"checklist":["commonMain.dependencies block exists","indentation for dependencies is 4 spaces"],"action_hint":"read_file on core-network/build.gradle.kts","success_criteria":"content contains 'commonMain.dependencies'"},{"n":3,"goal":"Insert implementation(libs.ktor.client.content.negotiation) into commonMain.dependencies","preconds":["step 2 DONE"],"checklist":["no duplicate line added","preserve exact indentation from step 2","place inside commonMain block only"],"action_hint":"search_and_replace with old_text being a unique anchor from the read_file result + new_text appending the new line","success_criteria":"matches >= 1"},{"n":4,"goal":"Verify the new line is actually present in the file","preconds":["step 3 DONE"],"checklist":["content contains implementation(libs.ktor.client.content.negotiation)","commonMain block still well-formed (braces balanced)"],"action_hint":"read_file again, check substring presence","success_criteria":"new dependency line substring is in content"}]}
